---
title: "LRPBX04: Block-2 not-taught receptive vocabulary, block-active exposure (UR2)"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

{{< include _partials/_header.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_setup.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_gate_badge.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_key_findings.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_reading_guide.qmd >}}

## Overview

LRPBX04 is a **block-exposure** model for block-2 **not-taught** receptive vocabulary (`b2rent`, out of 12): the receptive specificity / placebo comparator to the taught receptive model (LRPBX02), with the same staggered block-active exposure structure. Like the taught receptive outcome it is near-ceiling, so the exposure effect is expected to be weak; read alongside the other three as the not-taught receptive corner of the taught/not-taught × expressive/receptive quartet.

::: {.callout-warning title="One corrupt source cell dropped"}

`b2rent` contains one impossible value (subject `ID_0D60E282E4368506` at t4: `b2rent = 31` against the 12-item ceiling, with `b2reto = 10 < b2retau = 21` — total below taught, so the whole receptive-not-taught triple for that row is unrecoverable). That single observation is set to missing and dropped from this fit (logged in the run output); the 12-item denominator is unchanged. The cell is flagged to the data owner for a source correction.

:::

## Model

Beta-Binomial$(N, \mu\kappa, (1-\mu)\kappa)$ on the block-2 not-taught word count, $N = 12$, with
$\operatorname{logit}\mu_{i,t} = \alpha + \alpha_{\text{time}[t]} + \delta\,\text{exposed}_{i,t} + \gamma_A A_{\text{std},t} + \gamma_{\text{ability}}z(\text{blocks}) + \sum_{c}\gamma_c\,z(c) + u_{\text{child}}$, where $\text{exposed}_{i,t}=1$ once child $i$ has been taught block 2 by timepoint $t$ (immediate from t3, wait-list from t4), and the $z(c)$ are the standardised revised-DAG confounders hearing (HS = `hs`) and phonological memory (RW = `erbto`), each with a missing-indicator (read at the t1 baseline). No own-baseline term.

![Model diagram](model_graph.png){#fig-model .lightbox fig-align="left"}

{{< include _partials/_results_block_exposure.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_priors.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_prior_predictive.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_technical.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_footer.qmd >}}
